# TELAPSI_CONTEXT_INDEX

## LOCAL_RESOURCES
- Master Specs: ./SPECS.md  <-- Vision, Data Structure (Movies/Lessons), and Screen Flow
- Architecture: ./ARCHITECTURE.md  <-- Component Tree, UI/UX Layout Constraints
- Project Plan: ./PLAN.md  <-- System State and Execution Queue
- Project Log: ./CHANGELOG.md  <-- Discovery, Design, and Iteration History
- Agent Protocols: ./SQUAD_PROTOCOLS.md  <-- Agent Roles (@ask, @plan, @code, @debug)

## STACK_DOCUMENTATION
- React: https://react.dev/
- JavaScript (ES6+): https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript
- Tailwind CSS: https://tailwindcss.com/docs
- Firebase Web: https://firebase.google.com/docs/web/setup
- Mermaid: https://mermaid.js.org
